ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "full_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company headquarters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the company logo */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, acquired, dissolved) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the company's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_categories" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "founders" (
  "founder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each founder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the founder */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the founder */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company (for direct company-founder relationship) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the founder in the company */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile URL of the founder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("founder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_founders" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "founder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the founder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "founder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the employee */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the employee */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company (for direct company-employee relationship) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started working at the company */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile URL of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_employees" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of funding */,
  "round" TEXT /* Funding round (e.g., Series A, Seed) */,
  "investor_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of investor IDs */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., equity, debt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of investor (e.g., venture capital, angel investor) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the investor's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the investor's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_investors" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "technology_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_technologies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_locations" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "location_id")
)
column_names: URL to the company's official website
ID of the parent category (for subcategories)
ID of the company (for direct company-founder relationship)
Role of the founder in the company
LinkedIn profile URL of the founder
ID of the company (for direct company-employee relationship)
Date the employee started working at the company
LinkedIn profile URL of the employee
Type of investor (e.g., venture capital, angel investor)
URL to the investor's official website
State or province of the location
